2606.26794.title: ReasonCLIP-58M: Visually Grounded Commonsense Reasoning Supervision for CLIP
2606.26794.paper_summary: CLIP and its variants are widely adopted visual backbones in multimodal systems, but their pretraining remains dominated by descriptive image-text alignment. As downstream applications increasingly demand visually grounded commonsense inference and compositional reasoning, it remains unclear whether CLIP-style encoders can support such reasoning without architectural changes. To address this, we present ReasonCLIP-58M, a continual pretraining framework that integrates large-scale reasoning supervision into CLIP-style models through our two-stage strategy, which progressively integrates reasoning signals while preserving descriptive alignment, followed by category-structured reasoning supervision. To support this framework, we construct two complementary datasets and a benchmark: ReasonLite-42M, with open-form, visually verifiable reasoning captions; ReasonPro-16M, with category-specific reasoning supervision; and RCLIP-Bench for diagnostic evaluation of visually grounded reasoning. We train a family of ReasonCLIP that improves visually grounded commonsense and compositional reasoning while also enhancing zero-shot retrieval performance. As a drop-in visual encoder for multimodal large language models such as LLaVA-NeXT, ReasonCLIP delivers consistent gains without additional inference cost, demonstrating that structured reasoning supervision enhances the expressive capacity of CLIP-style visual representations. All datasets, models, and training code are available at https://github.com/RISys-Lab/ReasonCLIP.
2606.26794.paper_summary_zh: CLIP 及其變體在多模態系統中被廣泛採用作為視覺骨幹，但它們的預訓練仍然以描述性圖像-文本對齊為主。<lb/>隨著下游應用越來越需要視覺基礎的常識推理和組合推理，目前尚不清楚 CLIP 風格的編碼器是否能在不改變架構的情況下支持這種推理。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 ReasonCLIP-58M，一個持續預訓練框架，通過我們的兩階段策略將大規模推理監督整合到 CLIP 風格的模型中，該策略在保留描述性對齊的同時逐步整合推理信號，隨後進行類別結構的推理監督。<lb/>為了支持這個框架，我們構建了兩個互補的數據集和一個基準：ReasonLite-42M，具有開放式、可視驗證的推理標題；ReasonPro-16M，具有類別特定的推理監督；以及 RCLIP-Bench，用於視覺基礎推理的診斷評估。<lb/>我們訓練了一系列 ReasonCLIP，這些模型在提高視覺基礎的常識和組合推理的同時，也增強了零樣本檢索性能。<lb/>作為多模態大語言模型（如 LLaVA-NeXT）的即插即用視覺編碼器，ReasonCLIP 在不增加額外推理成本的情況下提供了一致的增益，證明了結構化推理監督增強了 CLIP 風格視覺表示的表達能力。<lb/>所有數據集、模型和訓練代碼均可在 https://github.com/RISys-Lab/ReasonCLIP 獲得。
2606.26794.author: Sicheng Zhang et.al.
2606.26794.authors: Sicheng Zhang, Muzammal Naseer, Binzhu Xie, Naufal Suryanto, Shi Qiu, Jamal Bentahar, Naveed Akhtar, Mubarak Shah
